subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto that which the Pen of thy Lord, the All-Knowing, calleth out unto thee, and take what floweth therefrom as a lamp unto thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غلام اسمع ما ینادیک قلم ربک العلام ثم اتخذ ما یجری منه لنفسک سراجا قد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @love of God, @mystical themes, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
